overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a long coat exiting a building, crossing a rainy urban street with pedestrians carrying umbrellas, and walking through a long concrete underpass. The scene features modern London-style architecture with wet reflective surfaces, transitioning from open overcast skies to an enclosed artificially lit tunnel.

segments.scene_description: The character stands inside a modern building exit lobby with glass doors opening to a rainy city street. Digital advertising screens line the interior walls as the character approaches and exits through the automatic doors to the outside.

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wet urban intersection under an overcast sky, surrounded by modern glass towers and brutalist concrete architecture. Pedestrians with umbrellas navigate the crosswalk alongside the character, while traffic lights and wet asphalt reflections dominate the street level.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk beside a brick wall covered in dense ivy, approaching a dark underpass entrance. The environment transitions from open sky to the shadow of the concrete overpass structure ahead.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long, dimly lit concrete underpass with massive support pillars and overhead lighting. A red double decker bus passes by on the left while the character continues toward the distant light at the tunnel exit, passing warning signs and parking markers along the pedestrian walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile interior of a modern building out into a rainy urban landscape and finally into a dimly lit concrete underpass. It begins inside a lobby lined with digital advertising screens, moving forward as the character exits through automatic glass doors into the rain. As the character crosses a wet intersection, the scene opens up to reveal towering glass and brutalist architecture reflected in the asphalt, surrounded by pedestrians with umbrellas under an overcast sky. The camera then follows the character along a sidewalk beside an ivy-covered brick wall, shifting from the open air into the deepening shadows of a concrete overpass. Finally, the environment closes in as the character walks through the long tunnel past massive support pillars and a passing red double-decker bus, heading toward the distant light of the exit.
